_help: Escort mode: F-15s defend F-18 dive boats harvesting shellfish. Sweep n_boats (escorts) x n_dive_boats and read dive_boats_lost / shellfish_harvested.
_bingo: recovery tankers that loiter near the dock to catch craft scrambling home on fumes; 0=off. Make n_bingo_tankers a [list] to sweep it; tune bingo_tanker_dist (fraction of width from port).
_layout: port(0.10) -> tankers -> reefs/F-18s(0.55) -> A-4 threats enter from the east(0.85)
_threats: A-4s spawn on the right and drive in; keep them SPARSE
